group.name: Fade Based
group.description: Fading and crossfades as the main animation, with breathing washes, soft beams and colour dissolves instead of hard on and off

cues.name: Intro
cues.description: Green wash that breathes gently up and down

cues.name: Menu
cues.description: Calm wash that drifts between blue and teal and settles

cues.name: Silhouettes
cues.description: Front stays dark while the back glows and breathes green

cues.name: Silhouettes Spotlight
cues.description: Dim green stage with a soft white bloom on the red drum

cues.name: Verse
cues.description: Blue and yellow dissolve across the stage on each measure while a light fades dark and steps around the ring on the beat

cues.name: Chorus
cues.description: Yellow and red dissolve across the stage on each measure while two lights fade dark at opposite poles and step around on the beat

cues.name: Default
cues.description: Red and blue trade places across front and back on each keyframe while a light fades dark and steps counter-clockwise on the beat

cues.name: Cool Automatic
cues.description: Blue and green dissolve gently across the stage on each measure

cues.name: Warm Automatic
cues.description: Red and yellow dissolve gently across the stage on each measure

cues.name: Harmony
cues.description: Cool blues at the front and warm reds at the back, with a white bloom on the red drum

cues.name: Stomp
cues.description: Blue stage with a white bloom swelling on every keyframe

cues.name: Score
cues.description: Blue stage that swells brighter and dims again in a slow continuous pulse

cues.name: Frenzy
cues.description: Each light glows a colour from green, red, yellow, blue, orange and steps to the next colour on every beat, scrolling a rainbow across both rows

cues.name: Searchlights
cues.description: A yellow beam steps around a dark stage on the beat, with a bright red pulse on every measure

cues.name: Sweep
cues.description: A soft red beam sweeps across a yellow stage

cues.name: Flare Fast
cues.description: A bright white beam races across a blue stage

cues.name: Flare Slow
cues.description: A dark gap drifts slowly counter-clockwise across a white stage

cues.name: Dischord
cues.description: The stage breathes between clashing green and red, with red stabs on the beat

cues.name: Big Rock Ending
cues.description: The whole stage races through white, yellow, red and blue with white hits on the kick
